name: Chimpanzini Bananini
lore:
Lore of Chimpanzini Bananini
                                    


A character features green chimpanzees nestled within a banana. Upon exiting the quiz video that reveals the character’s name, many individuals are inclined to share this video with someone who resembles a shipphanny. If you peel away the banana, you will discover toned muscles hidden beneath.
In the introductory video, various characters may make an appearance. Each character is unique, and they all conclude with the catchy phrase "Monkey Monkey Monkey Uchi." Additionally, some characters are introduced right after the phrase “Wow and Wow,” creating an engaging transition for viewers.
Description original text
Chimpanzini Bananini, Wah! Wah! Wah!
Baby Jenny Banani! and! and!
Bananuci, monkey, monkey, monkey, uchi.
Bananuchi, Monkey, Monkey, Monkey, Uki.
Supplete Banani, Wow! and! and!
Bananuchi, monkey, monkey, monkey, and uki.
